---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain the problem.

> **Do not** attach anything showing your Instagram/TikTok feed, direct
> messages, or other users' content. Redact usernames and personal data.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node version: [`node --version`]
- Platform being automated: [Instagram / TikTok / TikTok photo API]
- Interface: [web dashboard / `autopost` CLI]
- AutoPost version or commit:

## Selector break?

If posting broke after a platform UI change, note which step failed (upload,
caption, submit, etc.) and, if you found it, the new selector. See
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#how-selectors-work-and-how-to-fix-them).

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
